# Patterns that must never appear in log fixtures or unredacted source output.
# Lines starting with # are comments and are skipped by the CI grep step.
# Each pattern is a grep -E extended regex.
# The CI step skips lines that define constants/regexes for these patterns.
base64url\.bearer\.authorization\.redesigner\.dev\.[A-Za-z0-9_-]
authorization:\s*[Bb]earer\s+[A-Za-z0-9_\-]{8,}
